{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Dreadgod power
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Taking more [[Dreadgod power]] has consequences for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
